{{Quote|Drackmarianss do not sssleep.|A [[Unidentified Ri'Dar casino manager|Ri'Dar]], to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="TCoPL" />}}
'''Drackmarians''' were a [[Methane/Legends|methane]]-breathing [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that hailed from [[Drackmar]]. They were recognized as ferocious warriors.

==Biology and appearance==
{{Quote|The Drackmarian reputation for graciousness is well deserved.|Luke Skywalker, to [[Omogg]]|<ref name="TCoPL" />}}
Drackmarians were reptilian [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]]<ref name="CTD" /> recognizable by their large sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] along their snout, [[Color/Legends|colorful]] spotted scales,<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|204|Drackmar system}}</ref> vertically running spikes on the top of their head and along their shoulders.<ref name="CTD" /> They did not require [[Sleep/Legends|sleep]].<ref name="TCSWE" />

The species was native to Drackmar, a world with a [[Methane/Legends|methane]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] located in the [[Drackmar system/Legends|Drackmar system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> Hence, Drackmarians had to wear [[Breath mask/Legends|breath mask]] when traveling to worlds with an [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] atmosphere.<ref name="CTD" />

Drackmarians were known for their generosity and their fierce independence.<ref name="TCSWE" /> They usually resisted coercion to the death.<ref name="TCoPL" />

==History==
{{Quote|We get a couple of Hutts or a Drack in the refresher, we don't want the air circ to be overwhelmed.|[[Memah Roothes]]|<ref name="Death Star (novel)">[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]</ref>}}
Drackmarians were famous [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]]<ref name="TEA" /> who conquered several worlds<ref name="TEA" /><ref name="AA">''[[Alien Anthology]]''</ref> in their native [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]],<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> including [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]<ref name="TEA" /> and [[Morseer]].<ref name="AA" /> The [[Morseerian/Legends|Morseerian]] then became a client species of the Drackmarians.<ref name="TTaBS">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> The Drackmarians were also active as far as [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] where they attempted without success to conquer [[Sakiya]].<ref name="AA" />

During the [[Mandalorian Wars]], the Drackmarians joined the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]].<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Drackmarians were fearless opponents of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> As their area of influence fell within the [[Quelii Oversector]], [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Zsinj]] was tasked with conquering the Drackmarians. Controlling the largest fleet in the Empire, comprising the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Brawl'']] and hundred of [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] of the [[Crimson Command]], Zsinj led the attack against the Drackmarians.<ref name="TEGtW" /> Sometimes prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Drackmarians were driven out and forced to surrender.<ref name="TTaBS" /> They therefore lost control of Dathomir<ref name="TCoPL" /> and Morseer.<ref name="TTaBS" />

After the death of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the Drackmarians were only loosely allied with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the Drackmarian [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Omogg]] played a high-stakes game of [[Sabacc/Legends|Sabacc]] with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and lost the deed to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Dathomir.<ref name="TCoPL" /> It was in fact a subtle move of the Drackmarians to attract Han Solo and the New Republic to Zsinj's [[Rancor Base|secret base]] above Dathomir.<ref name="TEGtW" /> Zsinj was killed in the subsequent [[Battle of Dathomir (Hunt for Zsinj)|battle]].<ref name="TCoPL" />
